transcript: This class is going to have a very special spelling test. Any child who gets one single answer wrong goes to Chokey. What are you looking at? You. You. Spell... Let me see. Spell Newt. Newt. N-E-W-T. Newt. What? Miss Honey's taught us very well. Nonsense. You, stand up, turn around, and spell the one thing that you all are. Revolting. Revolting. R-E-V-O-L-T-I-N-G. Revolting. You're cheating! Of course she's not cheating! I taught them, that is all! With kindness, and patience, and respect! How dare you bring those words into my classroom, madam! You know nothing of teaching. And I shall prove it. You spell... Angelica mania septa recorsus the courses to Moses that's not a word you just made it up spell I'll go to Chucky and I should warn you it has silent letters. A, M, C, H, E, L, L, A. Oh, dearie, deary, dear. K? Oh, I'm so sorry. It was a silent Z. You're going to Chokey. Cat! C-A-F! Cat! I... I got it wrong. You're gonna have have to put me in Chokey too. What? Dog. D. Y. P. Me too. Table. X. A. B. F. Y. And me. What are you doing? What's going on? Stop this! You can't put us all in Chokey. Banana. G. T. A. A. B. L. Bully. P. Y. T-L-F-G-R-D-S-W. Grumble Day! A-S-E-S-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L-O-R-E-L- You have to put me in chokie. You can't put us all in chokie. Darn now, maggots! Did you think I hadn't thought of that? I've got chokies for each and every one of you. Look's writing on the chalkboard this is this is Magnus. No, no, no, no, it can't be. Is my Jenny back her house. Then leave or I will get you, got, me! Okay, yeah. Run! What? No! Run! No! Run, run, run, run, run! Run! Never again will they get the best of me Never again will they take away my freedom And we won't forget the day we fought For the right to be a little bit naughty Never again again will the chokie doll slam. Never again will we be bullied and never again will I doubt it when my mommy says I'm a miracle. Never again. Never again will we live a high five. Never again. Now we know we are revolting children living in a revolting time. We sing revolting songs using revolting laughs. We'll be revolting children, till our revolting's done. And we'll have the triumph of revolting, we're revolting. We are revolting children, living in revolting times. We sing revolting songs, using revolting lights. We'll be revolting children, till our revolting's done. And'll have the trumps for bolting, we're revolting! We will become a screaming horde! Take out your hockey sticks, and use it as a sun! Never again will we be ignored, we'll find out where the trunk is stored, and throw our pictures on the floor! It's been revolting, we're revoltingvolting! We can SPL how we like If no one's wrong, wrong is right And we want N-O-R-T-Y We're a little bit naughty So we've got to stay inside the line If we get away after six hours We're like a little turtle can do I can take the hammer and I can take you You didn't think you could push us too far But now we've got a family R-E-P-O-L-T-I-N U-S-I-N-G U-S-I-N-G R-E-P-O-L-T-I-N-G It is too L.A. for you, we are revolting We are revolvolting children living in Revolting town! We stand Revolting strong! You can Revolting us! We are Revolting children! We are Revolting town! And it's too early for you! We are Revolting!
